chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَكُفَّ عَنْهَا مَنْ كَانَ مُسْتَغْنِياً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 95 – It (Mut’a) should be restrained from by the one who is needless from it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/232)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/232)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمُتْعَةِ فَقَالَ وَ مَا أَنْتَ وَ ذَاكَ فَقَدْ أَغْنَاكَ اللَّهُ عَنْهَا قُلْتُ إِنَّمَا أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أَعْلَمَهَا فَقَالَ هِيَ فِي كِتَابِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُلْتُ نَزِيدُهَا وَ تَزْدَادُ فَقَالَ وَ هَلْ يَطِيبُهُ إِلَّا ذَاكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan Musaasws about the Mut’a, so heasws said: ‘And what is it with you and that, for Allahazwj has Made you to be needless from it?’ I said, ‘But rather, I intended to learn (about) it’. So heasws said: ‘It is in the Book of Aliasws’. So I said, ‘We can increase it, and she can increase it (term)?’ So heasws said: ‘And would it make him feel better except for that?’
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Afi ibn Yaqtin who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about al-Mut‘ah (advantageous marriage). He (the Imam) said, ‘What do you have to do with it when Allah has made you free of need for it?’ I then said, ‘I only wanted to know about it.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is in the book of Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam .’ I then asked, ‘Can we extend and they women extend (the time)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘What else makes him happy?”’
